patch.value: SDK author-ergonomics batch: extension-manifest JSON Schema, getWorkspaceContracts memoization, FlagDefinition type/value_type unification

SDK audit F4/F7/F8: (1) publish an extension-manifest.schema.json + $schema pointer for inline IDE validation; (2) getWorkspaceContracts re-loads+activates all extensions per call when extensionRegistrations isn't passed — memoize per pmRoot or document; (3) FlagDefinition exposes both type and value_type with silent 'type ?? value_type' precedence — unify on value_type (deprecate the other) to stop the footgun.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Partially addressed in the Extension SDK platform-maturity PR: FlagDefinition type/value_type precedence is now unified on value_type (value_type ?? type) in resolveLooseOptionCoercionKind, with type marked @deprecated in the SDK type + docs. REMAINING (kept open): (1) extension-manifest.schema.json + $schema pointer for IDE validation; (2) getWorkspaceContracts per-pmRoot memoization or documentation.
